reviews.comment:
Cómo siempre, todos los servicios, buena atención y el bar buenos precios. Destaco este punto ya que muchas YPF están adheridas franquicias que tienen precios de locos.

(Translated by Google)
As always, all the services were great, the customer service was good, and the bar had good prices. I want to emphasize this point because many YPF stations are franchises with crazy prices.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4457450818126724539/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtaHRtZzlRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Si pueden pasar a otra estación mejor. Mala atención de los playeros deben creer q nos hacen un favor. Atienden cuando dejan de conversar entre ellos o los amigos del lugar

(Translated by Google)
If you can go to another station, that would be better. The service from the attendants is terrible; they must think they're doing us a favor. They only serve customers when they stop talking amongst themselves or with their friends.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4457450818126724539/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHMXFUOUlnEAE

reviews.comment:
Mala atención de uno de los playeros,  primero me hizo esperar como 10 minutos atendiendo un camión del lado opuesto del surtidor, cosa que podía empezar a cargar en mi vehículo, y cuando terminó, se fue a hablar con el otro playero, sentí que me estaba gozando, entonces eleve mi queja en voz fuerte, exigiéndole que me atienda, una falta total de respeto.

(Translated by Google)
Bad service from one of the beach attendants. First, he made me wait for about 10 minutes while he attended to a truck on the opposite side of the pump, so he could have started loading my vehicle. When he finished, he went to talk to the other beach attendant. I felt like I was enjoying myself, so I complained loudly, demanding that he serve me. A total lack of respect.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4457450818126724539/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHeXJfV3V3RRAB
